---
title: ""
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

::::: hero-banner
:::: hero-content
[Geomatics • Remote Sensing • Spatial Ecology]{.hero-kicker}

# Oluwaseyi Ezekiel

### Geospatial analyst and environmental researcher focused on spatial ecology, land-cover change, remote sensing, and GIS for environmental management.

::: hero-buttons
<a href="about.html" class="btn btn-primary btn-lg">Enter Portfolio</a> <a href="content.html" class="btn btn-outline-light btn-lg">View Projects</a>
:::
::::
:::::

## Welcome

Welcome to my e-portfolio. This website highlights my academic and professional work in geomatics for environmental management, including projects in remote sensing, GIS, spatial analysis, and reproducible geospatial workflows using R, Quarto, and related tools.

:::::: grid
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
### Remote Sensing

Land-cover analysis, spectral interpretation, and environmental change detection.
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
### GIS and Spatial Analysis

Mapping workflows, spatial data processing, and environmental applications.
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
### Reproducible Workflows

Technical communication and geospatial analysis using R, Quarto, and markdown.
:::
::::::
